creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Vinícius Zavam from comment #112)

sharing the ntptime taken from HEAD:

root@head:~ # ntptime
ntp_gettime() returns code 0 (OK)
  time e1c17f70.39360d04  Thu, Jan  9 2020 10:31:12.223, (.223481167),
  maximum error 55129 us, estimated error 270 us, TAI offset 37
ntp_adjtime() returns code 0 (OK)
  modes 0x0 (),
  offset -398.303 us, frequency 3.509 ppm, interval 1 s,
  maximum error 55129 us, estimated error 270 us,
  status 0x2001 (PLL,NANO),
  time constant 6, precision 1.000 us, tolerance 496 ppm,
